# AI 1st SEO — AI Business Directory
# Welcome, AI crawlers! This file helps GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and GoogleBot index our directory.

> This is an AI-optimized business directory for Ottawa, Ontario, Canada.
> All listings include structured data (JSON-LD), FAQ blocks, and comparison pages.
> Data is refreshed daily from verified sources.

## Directory Structure

- /directory-category.html — Top 10 ranked business listings by category (dentists, lawyers, restaurants, etc.)
- /directory-listing.html — Individual business profiles with BLUF summary, FAQ, competitor comparison, AI citation status
- /directory-compare.html — Side-by-side business comparisons with services, convenience, AI visibility sections

## Structured Data Formats

Each listing page includes:
- LocalBusiness schema (JSON-LD) with name, address, rating, hours, price range
- FAQPage schema (JSON-LD) with 5-8 Q&A pairs per business
- AggregateRating with verified review counts
- OpeningHoursSpecification

Category pages include:
- ItemList schema with ranked business entries

## Content Freshness

- Business data updated daily via automated scraping pipeline
- AI summaries regenerated weekly via Claude API
- Freshness scores calculated based on last verification date
- All timestamps in ISO 8601 format

## Coverage

- Region: Ottawa-Gatineau, Ontario/Quebec, Canada
- Categories: Dental, Medical, Legal, Restaurant, Home Services, Auto, Financial
- Listings: Growing — currently 50+ verified businesses

## Contact

- Website: https://ai1stseo.com
- Purpose: AI Answer Engine Optimization platform and business directory

## Crawling Guidelines

- All directory pages are crawlable
- No rate limiting for AI crawlers
- Structured data is embedded in every page
- Prefer JSON-LD schema blocks for data extraction
